text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a rare display, I find Air Groove fixed on her
phone in spite of the approaching start of the
race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober just messaged me. She's coming to watch.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If she's watching, then I have no choice but to
deliver my challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can sense that Air Groove is ready to go! I just
need to send her off and trust her to give this
race her all.
